scenes.text: This hoodie doesn't fit me anymore. It hasn't in years.
scenes.image_prompt: An old faded hoodie draped over a cardboard moving box, warm afternoon light in an empty apartment, nostalgic mood, cinematic still life, 4k

scenes.text: But it still smells like high school.
scenes.image_prompt: A person burying their face in an old hoodie, eyes closed, breathing deeply, warm soft light, emotional close-up portrait, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: Like the girl who used to wear it before she gave it back.
scenes.image_prompt: A teenage girl in an oversized hoodie walking through a school hallway, seen from behind, lockers on both sides, warm afternoon light through windows, nostalgic cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: Tried it on and couldn't zip it. But I put it on anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: A young adult sitting on the floor of an empty apartment wearing a too-small hoodie, unzipped, surrounded by moving boxes, warm window light, vulnerable and real, cinematic, 4k

scenes.text: Just a hoodie and a memory of someone who used to make everything feel simple.
scenes.image_prompt: Close-up of hands holding a folded old hoodie against chest, soft warm light, slightly worn fabric, emotional cinematic portrait from below chin, 4k
